message:
chore(gitignore): add target_*/ pattern for agent-named build dirs

Agent-spawned builds use names like target_rosebison/, target_rosebison_cov/,
etc. The existing target-codex*/ only matched hyphen-prefixed variants.
Added target_*/ to catch all underscore-prefixed agent build directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 a.out
 --graph-format.svg
 target-codex*/
+target_*/
 
 # Local legacy-oracle mirrors (too large for source repo)
 /legacy_*/
